summary: Growth Loop / Referral System testing complete. 13/13 backend tests pass. All frontend features verified. Share modal with ref param, action share page with referral note, localStorage storage, and backend referral tracking all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Share page (og_share.py) correctly passes ref param through OG meta tags and redirect URL
Registration (auth.py) correctly creates referral record in 'referrals' collection with inviter_id, invited_user_id, action_id, source='share_link'
ActionSharePage.js stores ref param in localStorage (philos_ref_user, philos_ref_action) on page load
AuthScreen.js reads localStorage and sends referral_user_id/referral_action_id in registration payload
ShareModal in ActionFeed.js includes ?ref=userId in share URLs when user is logged in
seed_data_creation: Created test referral during testing: test-ref-user-id invited user 1262f3fd-ef0b-49b5-ae91-6b4f07727ebf via action 69b801b5587478df30250fab
context_for_next_testing_agent: Growth loop referral system fully working. Key data-testids: share-btn-{actionId}, share-modal, share-copy-link, share-whatsapp, share-linkedin, share-twitter, action-share-page, share-referral-note, share-action-title. Referrals collection stores: inviter_id, invited_user_id, action_id, source, created_at. GET /api/referrals/{user_id} returns referrals made by that user.

features_verified.GET /api/share/action/{id}?ref=USER_ID r: PASS - OG tags present, ref param passed to redirect URL /app/action/{id}?ref=USER_ID
features_verified.GET /api/actions/{action_id} returns act: PASS - trust_signal, reactions, title all present
features_verified.POST /api/auth/register with referral_us: PASS - referral record created in referrals collection
features_verified.GET /api/referrals/{user_id} returns lis: PASS - returns inviter_id, invited_user_id, action_id, source, created_at
features_verified.Share modal generates correct WhatsApp/L: PASS - all social share buttons present and functional
features_verified./app/action/{id} page loads publicly wit: PASS - shows title, contributor, category, community, trust score
features_verified.Referral note 'You were invited to Philo: PASS - visible on action share page
